top_signals.title: Belarus Starts Nuclear Drills With Russia Amid Kyiv Warnings
top_signals.summary: Belarus announced that its armed forces would conduct snap nuclear exercises alongside Russian allies, following warnings from Kyiv that it could retaliate if Minsk becomes more deeply involved in the Kremlin’s war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Iran War Could Trigger a Global Fertilizer Shock
top_signals.summary: The loss of fertilizer shipments coming from the Persian Gulf as a result of the Iran war got me thinking about the chemist Justus von Liebig, a prominent 19th-century proponent of the mineral theory of plant nutrition. Liebig is the popularizer of what is now known as Liebig's Law of the Minimum. The law states that the least available essential nutrient limits the growth of plants. This means once a grower runs out of one essential nutrient, adding extra of others will not make up for the lack of the one that is limited. Liebig's eponymous law…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Israel, Hezbollah war persists despite truce extension; Lebanon's death toll passes 3,000 - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Israel, Hezbollah war persists despite truce extension; Lebanon's death toll passes 3,000  Reuters

top_signals.title: NextEra’s Mega-Utility Deal Will Shore Up Its Credit Profile
top_signals.summary: NextEra Energy Inc.’s $67 billion bid for Dominion Energy Inc. won’t just create an energy giant stretching from Florida to Virginia, it’s also helping the power firm shore up its credit standing in the eyes of rating companies.
